metadata.description: Community plugins for Claude Code - development workflow utilities, formatters, and productivity tools

plugins.name: code-formatter
plugins.description: Universal code formatter and linter with support for ruff, black, prettier, eslint, and more

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow automation for commits, branches, and project management

plugins.name: dokku-manage
plugins.description: Dokku deployment automation skill for managing apps and deployments on Linux VMs

plugins.name: skill-email-otp
plugins.description: Python CLI tool and skill for creating temporary email addresses and automatically extracting OTP codes and validation links from incoming emails

plugins.name: sliplane
plugins.description: Управление платформой Sliplane для деплоя Docker-контейнеров на Hetzner
